metadata.description: 策略模式: Define a family of algorithms that can be used interchangeably. Eliminate if-else statements. Python code example: Suppose we have an algorithm to process different types of data, and instead of using if-else statements, we use a dictionary to map the type of data to the corresponding processing function. ```python def process_data(data_type): # Dictionary mapping data types to their respective processing functions processors = { 'text': process_text, 'image': process_image, # Add more data types and their corresponding functions as needed } # Get the appropriate processor based on the data type processor = processors.get(data_type) if processor is None: raise ValueError(f"No processor found for data type: {data_type}") # Call the processor function with the data return processor(data) def process_text(text): print("Processing text:", text) def process_image(image): print("Processing image:", image) # Example usage process_data('text') # Output: Processing text: <input text> process_data('image') # Output: Processing image: <input image> ``` In this example, the `processors` dictionary is used to replace if-else statements for selecting the appropriate processing function based on the data type.

data_pointers.title: 策略模式
